name: research
description: v4.2.0 - Route-before-gate proposition-first R&D workflow with next-step shape selection for hypothesis refinement, scoping, EDA, proposition ownership, hypothesis plans, method-routed result analysis, papers, and quant research support.

interface.longDescription: v4.2.0 - Agent-driven R&D skills for moving from intent through a route-before-gate workflow: implementation handoff, materialization, exploratory probes, implementation milestones, proposition commit, ambition elevation, hypothesis plans, claim resolution, paper route, and stakeholder briefs. creating-propositions owns proposition generation and proposition state files under propositions/Pxxx_slug/ with the unified states open, supported, unrealized-condition, under-specified, contradicted, split-needed, split, parked, and closed. research orchestrates generated project layout, scoping literature, material acquisition, EDA, project observations, derived hypotheses, plan review, execution artifacts, method-routed root-cause-oriented result analysis, claim records, decision ledgers, status_brief.md for interim stakeholder updates, and proposition-level paper.md creation only when a proposition reaches supported or contradicted. After a failed hypothesis, next-step shape selection separates parent-hypothesis refinement from material/protocol repair and side observations so evaluator fixes or unexpected anomalies do not silently replace the parent proposition's evidentiary target. The canonical layout includes intake.md, literature/scoping.md, literature/papers.md, literature/positioning.md, data/raw, data/processed, data/eda, observations.md, status_brief.md, lib/{data,eval,viz,utils,tests}, and propositions/. Old top-level plans, top-level experiment runs, literature/differentiation.md, per-hypothesis reports, and provisional paper.md drafts are not compatibility paths. research-plan-review remains the plan-path-only pre-execution review skill. research-result-analysis remains the plan-path-only post-execution why-analysis skill that builds a result-feature ledger, routes to the relevant analysis method, and returns causal factor decomposition, root-cause candidates, mechanism traces, and discriminators for apparent hits, missed predictions, mixed results, and other observed result shapes. quant-research remains the domain extension for time-series validation, leakage checks, multiple-testing risk, and robustness.
defaultPrompt: Start this R&D project from intent through intake and scoping
Create proposition workspaces from these observations
Design a hypothesis plan under this proposition
Draft a proposition-level research paper from this resolved proposition
